mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and compress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hikes with p<0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals imminent corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal spending and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with Rank IC > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative or flat 20-day forward returns during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index levels erode real corporate margins and trigger anticipated monetary tightening, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL increases consistently precede positive 5-day forward returns with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly nonfarm payroll increase exceeding 150,000 signals strong economic momentum and wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by more than 150.0 thousand in a single month
failure_condition: Payroll surges above 150k are followed by negative 60-day returns in over 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and real personal spending confirms broad-based economic expansion, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined GDPC1 and RSAFS growth fails to generate positive 20-day returns with Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate surpasses 4.5%, real interest rates turn positive and restrictive, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive real rates consistently precede positive 60-day forward returns during tightening periods.
